overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a military simulation game showing a player moving along a sunny Mediterranean-style beach. The character walks past scattered coastal trees and a small building complex with solar panels before reaching the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal beach with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the sandy beach toward a distant building complex visible ahead

entered.detail: green leafy trees casting shadows on the sand
light colored sand covering the ground
calm blue water along the shoreline
multi-story building with red roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny beach with the camera moving forward along the sand. Coastal trees line the left side while calm sea water is visible to the right. A white building with a red roof stands in the far distance ahead, serving as a focal point for the movement.

events.description: yellow single-story building becomes visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach path, approaching the building complex ahead

entered.detail: single-story yellow building with brown roof
red industrial-style building with solar panels on the roof

segments.scene_description: As the camera advances, a yellow building appears on the left while the distant white building grows larger ahead. A red building with solar panels becomes visible in the center. The trees shift to the mid-ground as the beach continues toward the building complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: building complex perimeter with mixed structures

events.description: camera turns slightly right toward the sea, passing the white apartment building

agents.ego_description: navigating around the building complex and turning toward the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The camera moves close to the white apartment building, passing the red and yellow buildings on the left. Around the 35-second mark, the perspective shifts toward the right, aiming toward the sea visible through the coastal trees. The ground remains sandy as the built environment gives way to natural coastal vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: open beach shoreline with clear water view

events.description: emerging from tree cover onto open beach with unobstructed sea view

agents.ego_description: walking toward the water's edge through coastal trees to reach the open shoreline

entered.detail: distant landmass visible across the water on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera moving through coastal trees to reach the open shoreline. The white building is left behind as the view opens up to a panoramic vista of the calm sea. The sandy beach stretches ahead with the water meeting the horizon under the clear blue sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a sunny beach that transitions from a path toward a coastal building complex into an open vista of the sea. It begins with the camera advancing across the sand, flanked by coastal trees on the left and calm water on the right, while a distant white building with a red roof serves as the focal point. As the camera draws closer, the environment becomes more developed, passing a yellow building and a red structure equipped with solar panels. The perspective then shifts toward the right, moving past the apartment complex and through a screen of coastal vegetation. Finally, the camera breaks through the trees to reach the open shoreline, where the buildings vanish from view and the scene expands into a panoramic view of the calm sea meeting a clear blue horizon.
